case_title: GREGORY ANYANWU ET AL VS. FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,872.58 FILED BY ANYANWU, GREGORY ANYANWU, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY FRISCO PRO BUILIDING SERVICES ESPARZA, CARLOS ESTRELLA JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-24-2023 SC-100 MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT AT THIS ADDRESS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANYANWU, GREGORY ANYANWU, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRISCO PRO BUILIDING SERVICES ESPARZA, CARLOS ESTRELLA JUAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE SEP-25-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERED AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-20-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GREGORY ANYANWU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM ANYANWU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRISCO PRO BUILDING SERVICES IS PRESNET. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY. DEFENDANT FRISCO PRO BUILDING SERVICES WANTS TO FILE A CROSSCLAIM, REFER TO ACCESS CENTER FOR HOW TO FILE A CROSSCLAIM. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS FOR CONTINUANCE TO TRY TO SERVE DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANTS FRISCO PRO BUILDING SERVICES AND CARLOS ESTRELLA JUAN ESPARZA ARE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
